stemHtml: After unlawful interference, an aircraft must depart its cruising level without radio contact. No regional procedures exist. What offset should it fly?

options.a: 400 m, where 600 m separation is applied.
options.b: 250 m, where 600 m separation is applied.
options.c: 200 m, where 300 m separation is applied.
options.d: 150 m, where 300 m separation is applied.
